rows.query: British Grand Prix 2026-07-05 weather forecast Silverstone rain probability wet skill
rows.title: British Grand Prix Silverstone race-day Open-Meteo forecast
rows.snippet: British Grand Prix Silverstone forecast snapshot before cutoff: precipitation probability max 2% and precipitation sum 0.00mm for race day, supporting an event-level wet_skill adjustment.

route_notes: Changes wet probability or wet-performance contribution depending on target scope.
route_preview.metric_notes: Event-level weather changes wet probability; driver-level claims affect relative wet performance.

impact_band_guidance.use_when: Context is directionally relevant but unlikely to change simulation ordering.
impact_band_guidance.review_rule: May be archived without review only when source reliability is at least 0.75.

impact_band_guidance.use_when: Single-source setup, weather, or form signal with plausible but limited race effect.
impact_band_guidance.review_rule: Review required when source reliability is below 0.70 or timestamps are uncertain.

impact_band_guidance.use_when: Source-backed event-specific issue, upgrade, penalty, or weather signal likely to move a target group.
impact_band_guidance.review_rule: Needs source linkage plus either official/team/structured source or independent corroboration.

impact_band_guidance.use_when: Confirmed grid penalty, major reliability issue, substantial rain change, or run-tested upgrade effect.
impact_band_guidance.review_rule: Always review; require at least one high-reliability source and explicit reasoning.

rows.next_action: Open and snapshot the source, then convert only source-backed facts into research_packet_template.json claims.

candidates.title: search result or page title
candidates.observed_at: ISO timestamp when Codex saw it

output_contract.next_step: Review ready candidates, inspect/snapshot accepted sources, then fill research_packet_template.json.
